#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Slack Workplace Agent Team – GitHub Auto-Deploy
Pushes 49 project files to GitHub using only Python stdlib.
Usage:  python3 deploy_to_github.py
"""
import base64, json, time, sys
import urllib.request, urllib.error

TOKEN  = "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"
REPO   = "ronavkarumsi04/slack-multi-agent"
BRANCH = "main"
API    = f"https://api.github.com/repos/{REPO}/contents"

FILES = {
    ".env.example": "",
    ".gitignore": "",
    "README.md": "",
    "agents/__init__.py": "",
    "agents/models.py": "",
    "agents/orchestrator.py": "",
    "agents/registry.py": "",
    "agents/roles/__init__.py": "",
    "agents/roles/prompts.py": "",
    "api/__init__.py": "",
    "api/routes/__init__.py": "",
    "api/routes/register.py": "",
    "config/__init__.py": "ZnJvbSAuc2V0dGluZ3MgaW1wb3J0IHNldHRpbmdzCgpfX2FsbF9fID0gWyJzZXR0aW5ncyJdCg==",
    "config/settings.py": "",
    "dashboard/__init__.py": "",
    "dashboard/app.py": "",
    "docker/Dockerfile": "",
    "docker/docker-compose.yml": "",
    "docker/prometheus.yml": "",
    "examples/full-workplace-team.yaml": "",
    "examples/minimal-nim-team.yaml": "",
    "main.py": "",
    "memory/__init__.py": "ZnJvbSAubWFuYWdlciBpbXBvcnQgTWVtb3J5TWFuYWdlcgoKX19hbGxfXyA9IFsiTWVtb3J5TWFuYWdlciJdCg==",
    "memory/manager.py": "",
    "observability/__init__.py": "ZnJvbSAubG9nZ2VyIGltcG9ydCBFdmVudExvZ2dlciwgTWV0cmljc0NvbGxlY3RvciwgZXZlbnRfbG9nZ2VyCgpfX2FsbF9fID0gWyJFdmVudExvZ2dlciIsICJNZXRyaWNzQ29sbGVjdG9yIiwgImV2ZW50X2xvZ2dlciJdCg==",
    "observability/logger.py": "",
    "providers/__init__.py": "",
    "providers/anthropic_provider.py": "",
    "providers/base.py": "",
    "providers/groq_provider.py": "",
    "providers/nim_provider.py": "",
    "providers/openai_provider.py": "",
    "push_to_github.sh": "",
    "requirements.txt": "",
    "safety/__init__.py": "ZnJvbSAuZ3VhcmQgaW1wb3J0IFNhZmV0eUd1YXJkCgpfX2FsbF9fID0gWyJTYWZldHlHdWFyZCJdCg==",
    "safety/guard.py": "",
    "scripts/bootstrap.sh": "",
    "slack/__init__.py": "",
    "slack/event_handler.py": "",
    "slack/provisioner.py": "",
    "tools/__init__.py": "ZnJvbSAuZGlzcGF0Y2hlciBpbXBvcnQgVG9vbERpc3BhdGNoZXIsIEJhc2VQbHVnaW4KCl9fYWxsX18gPSBbIlRvb2xEaXNwYXRjaGVyIiwgIkJhc2VQbHVnaW4iXQo=",
    "tools/dispatcher.py": "",
    "tools/plugins/__init__.py": "IyBQbHVnaW4gcGFja2FnZXMgYXV0by1kaXNjb3ZlcmVkIGJ5IFRvb2xEaXNwYXRjaGVyCg==",
    "tools/plugins/calculator_plugin.py": "",
    "tools/plugins/github_plugin.py": "",
    "tools/plugins/http_plugin.py": "",
    "tools/plugins/jira_plugin.py": "",
    "tools/plugins/slack_plugin.py": "",
    "tools/plugins/web_search_plugin.py": "",

def req(url, method="GET", payload=None):
    data = json.dumps(payload).encode() if payload else None
    r = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, method=method)
    r.add_header("Authorization", f"Bearer {TOKEN}")
    r.add_header("Accept", "application/vnd.github.v3+json")
    r.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json")
    return r


def get_sha(path):
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req(f"{API}/{path}"), timeout=30) as resp:
            return json.loads(resp.read()).get("sha")
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        if e.code == 404:
            return None
        raise


def push(path, b64, sha=None):
    payload = {"message": f"feat: add {path}", "content": b64, "branch": BRANCH}
    if sha:
        payload["sha"] = sha
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req(f"{API}/{path}", "PUT", payload), timeout=60) as resp:
        return resp.status in (200, 201)


def main():
    print("=" * 65)
    print("  Slack Workplace Agent Team — GitHub Auto-Deploy")
    print(f"  Target : github.com/{REPO}  branch: {BRANCH}")
    print(f"  Files  : {len(FILES)}")
    print("=" * 65)

    ok = fail = 0
    for path, b64 in FILES.items():
        print(f"  -> {path}", end="", flush=True)
        try:
            sha = get_sha(path)
            if push(path, b64, sha):
                print(" OK")
                ok += 1
            else:
                print(" FAILED (no error)")
                fail += 1
        except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
            body = e.read().decode()[:300]
            print(f" FAILED HTTP {e.code}: {body}")
            fail += 1
        except Exception as exc:
            print(f" FAILED: {exc}")
            fail += 1
        time.sleep(0.15)

    print("-" * 65)
    print(f"Done: {ok} pushed, {fail} failed")
    if fail == 0:
        print(f"\n✅  All files live at: https://github.com/{REPO}")
        print("\nNext steps:")
        print("  1. Copy .env.example -> .env  and fill in your API keys")
        print("  2. docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d")
        print("  3. Visit https://api.slack.com/apps  and create app from manifest")
        print("     curl http://localhost:8000/api/manifest")
    else:
        sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
